prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic vertical portrait of an intimate rainy-night scene outside an elegant old European storefront or café window. Two adults stand extremely close beneath warm available light: a beautiful woman with long wet dark wavy hair, olive skin, wearing an oversized dark charcoal blazer over a low dark top leans back against the rain-speckled glass, looking up with parted lips, while a handsome tall man with wet curly dark hair, light stubble, white dress shirt with sleeves down, black waistcoat and dark trousers faces her in profile, head tilted down toward her, one hand in his pocket. Their faces are inches apart, creating romantic tension without kissing. Use only practical available light from the glowing shop window and distant street lamps, with amber reflections, rain droplets on glass, wet fabric, and strong subsurface scattering on wet skin. The window shows partial vintage lettering reading RIVERA. Background is a dark narrow street with soft golden bokeh lights and shallow depth of field. Style: high-end cinematic editorial photography, 85mm lens look, natural skin texture, moody warm color grading, realistic rain, glossy highlights, soft shadows, intimate composition, no flash, no studio lighting, no text overlays beyond the storefront lettering.
promptEn: Create a cinematic photorealistic vertical portrait of an intimate rainy-night scene outside an elegant old European storefront or café window. Two adults stand extremely close beneath warm available light: a beautiful woman with long wet dark wavy hair, olive skin, wearing an oversized dark charcoal blazer over a low dark top leans back against the rain-speckled glass, looking up with parted lips, while a handsome tall man with wet curly dark hair, light stubble, white dress shirt with sleeves down, black waistcoat and dark trousers faces her in profile, head tilted down toward her, one hand in his pocket. Their faces are inches apart, creating romantic tension without kissing. Use only practical available light from the glowing shop window and distant street lamps, with amber reflections, rain droplets on glass, wet fabric, and strong subsurface scattering on wet skin. The window shows partial vintage lettering reading RIVERA. Background is a dark narrow street with soft golden bokeh lights and shallow depth of field. Style: high-end cinematic editorial photography, 85mm lens look, natural skin texture, moody warm color grading, realistic rain, glossy highlights, soft shadows, intimate composition, no flash, no studio lighting, no text overlays beyond the storefront lettering.
promptZh: 创作一张电影级写实风格的竖版肖像，展现优雅的欧洲老式店面或咖啡馆窗外亲密的雨夜场景。两名成年人站在温暖的自然光下，距离极近：一位 美丽的女性，留着湿漉漉的深色长波浪卷发，橄榄色皮肤，穿着超大号深炭灰色西装外套，内搭深色低领上衣 靠在布满雨滴的玻璃上，微微仰头，双唇微张；一位 英俊的高个男性，留着湿漉漉的深色卷发，留着浅浅的胡茬，身穿白色衬衫，袖子放下，搭配黑色马甲和深色长裤 侧身面对她，头向下倾斜，一只手插在口袋里。两人的脸仅有几英寸之隔，营造出一种未接吻的浪漫张力。仅使用发光店面橱窗和远处路灯提供的实用自然光，呈现琥珀色的倒影、玻璃上的雨滴、湿润的织物以及湿润皮肤上强烈的次表面散射效果。窗户上显示部分复古字体，写着 RIVERA。背景是昏暗狭窄的街道，带有柔和的金色光斑和浅景深。风格：高端电影级编辑摄影，85mm 镜头质感，自然的皮肤纹理，情绪化的暖色调，逼真的雨水，光泽高光，柔和阴影，亲密的构图，无闪光灯，无影棚灯光，除店面文字外无任何文字叠加。
